function_v0.doc:
Get all LP position values for `account` across all registered Aquarius pools.

For each registered pool (filtered by `enabled_position_ids` when non-empty):
1. `pool.share_id()` \xe2\x86\x92 LP token address; `lp_token.balance(account)` \xe2\x86\x92 user LP shares (i128)
2. Skip pool if user_shares == 0 or total_shares == 0
3. `pool.get_reserves()` \xe2\x86\x92 [reserve_a, reserve_b]
4. `pool.get_tokens()` \xe2\x86\x92 [token_a, token_b]
5. For each non-zero reserve leg:
a. `token.decimals()` (SEP-41)
b. `oracle_registry.get_price_pair(token, accounting_token)`
c. Compute user's pro-rata token amount and USDC value
d. Append a `PositionValue` entry

Each pool contributes up to two `PositionValue` entries (one per token leg).

# Panics
Panics if any arithmetic operation overflows or token decimals are too large.
function_v0.name: get_all_pos
